title: AIO_TrackingEnd
description: End the distance tracking function started by AIO_TrackingStart.
see_also:
AIO_TrackingSet, AIO_TrackingStart, AIO_TrackingOn Function

AIO_TrackingEnd  Statement Example

The following is an example program which moves the robot by using the distance tracking function.

(P1: Start point, P2: relay point, P3: End point)

Caution:  The parameters set in the example are reference values.

Please note that the operation may not be successful or the motion may be vibratory depending on the set parameters and some operating conditions.

If the robot moves abnormally, immediately hold down the emergency button.

Function Main

  Motor On

  Power High

  SpeedS 30

  AccelS 300,300

  Go P1                           ' Move to P1: start point

  AIO_TrackingSet 1,1,0,-5,5,0,2  ' Set the distance tracking function

  AIO_TrackingStart 1,5,5,5       ' Start the distance tracking function

  Move P2                         ' Move to P2 with executing the distance tracking function

  Move P3                         ' Move to P3 with executing the distance tracking function

  AIO_TrackingEnd                 ' End the distance tracking function

  Motor Off

Fend
examples:
Function Main Motor On Power High SpeedS 30 AccelS 300,300 Go P1                           ' Move to P1: start point AIO_TrackingSet 1,1,0,-5,5,0,2  ' Set the distance tracking function AIO_TrackingStart 1,5,5,5       ' Start the distance tracking function Move P2                         ' Move to P2 with executing the distance tracking function Move P3                         ' Move to P3 with executing the distance tracking function AIO_TrackingEnd                 ' End the distance tracking function Motor Off
Fend
